title: Dazzling Chinese Galangal Noodles
description: This dish features galangal in a winey and aerated Chinese noodle recipe, perfect for special occasions, and is prepared in an ayurvedic-sattvic friendly manner.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced shallots and cook until they are lightly browned and crispy.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced galangal and cook for 2 minutes, until slightly tender.
Add the vegetable broth, dry white wine, and soy sauce, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Add the rice noodles to the skillet and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the cubed tofu to the skillet and cook until it is heated through.
Stir in the chopped scallions and sesame seeds.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional scallions and sesame seeds if desired.
